name: @neverreven/ai-orchestra
description: Universal, project-agnostic agentic toolkit. Drop it into any project and ask your agent to 'run the orchestra'. Installs structured AI infrastructure (rules, skills, learnings, session protocol). Optionally activate a multi-agent ensemble (Tier 2) or Telegram remote orchestration (Tier 3).
author: neverreven

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "if(process.env.npm_command==='install'||process.env.npm_command==='add'){console.log('
  ai-orchestra was added to node_modules/.
  To set it up in your project, run:

    npx @neverreven/ai-orchestra init

  (This package is a spec folder for your AI agent, not a code library.)
');}"
